markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Abdel Aziz Hatem records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 24, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 24, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Abdel Aziz Hatem: 1+ goals

markets.title: Benjamin Tahirovic: 1+ goals

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 24, 2026 6 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 91.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 91.99° on Jun 24, 2026 at 6pm EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Wade Meckler records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Baltimore vs Los Angeles A professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 24, 2026 at 4:07 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Wade Meckler is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Wade Meckler starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Wade Meckler is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Wade Meckler is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Wade Meckler: 5+ hits + runs + RBIs?

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Tyler Heineman is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tyler Heineman starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tyler Heineman is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Tyler Heineman is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Tyler Heineman: 3+ hits + runs + RBIs?
